merge_policy: Annual fixture records create candidate meetings.
Rolling/racecard/entries/declarations/daily-info records confirm final times where official time data exists.
Confirmed rolling/racecard records override annual candidate time status.
Annual candidate meetings without racecard data remain visible as pending.
Coverage gaps remain visible and are not silently dropped.
No race times may be invented or generated.
